"'''Cat and Mouse'''" is a mini-adventure by [[Eric Cagle]] for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game|''Star Wars'' Roleplaying Game]] book ''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]''. The adventure was made freely downloadable at [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Wizards.com|website]].

==Plot summary==
The [[Gambler/Legends|gambler]] [[Kelna Toodo]] has come into possession of a starship with a rare [[Corellian sand panther/Legends|Corellian sand panther]]. Desperate to escape his servitude with [[Beeda]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], he sets a plan in motion to have the sand panther hunt group of [[spacer]]s.
